metadata.description: The friendly name for the workbook that is used in the Gallery or Saved List.  This name must be unique within a resource group.
The gallery that the workbook will been shown under. Supported values include workbook, tsg, etc. Usually, this is 'workbook'
The id of resource instance to which the workbook will be associated
The unique guid for this workbook instance

| where ObjectSubType contains "agent"
| where ObjectSubType contains '{ObjectSubType}' or '{ObjectSubType}' == "*"
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by ObjectId, RoleSystem
| where RoleSystem in ({RoleSystem}) or '*' in ({RoleSystem})

| mv-expand Classification
| where Classification.AdminTierLevelName in ({AdminTierLevelName}) or '*' in ({AdminTierLevelName})
| where Classification.Service in ({Service}) or '*' in ({Service})
| where ObjectSubType contains '{ObjectSubType}' or '{ObjectSubType}' == "*"

| distinct ObjectId, ObjectAdminTierLevelName
| summarize Count = count() by ObjectAdminTierLevelName
| join kind = fullouter (datatable(ObjectAdminTierLevelName:string)['ControlPlane', 'ManagementPlane','WorkloadPlane','UserAccess','Unclassified']) on ObjectAdminTierLevelName
| project ObjectAdminTierLevelName = iff(ObjectAdminTierLevelName == '', ObjectAdminTierLevelName1, ObjectAdminTierLevelName), Count = iff(ObjectAdminTierLevelName == '', 0, Count)

| where ObjectSubType contains '{ObjectSubType}' or '{ObjectSubType}' == "*"
| where ObjectAdminTierLevelName contains '{ObjectAdminTierLevelName}' or '{ObjectAdminTierLevelName}' == "*"
| where RoleSystem in ({RoleSystem}) or '*' in ({RoleSystem})

| where ObjectDisplayName contains '{PrincipalDisplayName}' or '{PrincipalDisplayName}' == ""

| distinct ObjectId, RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName = tostring(Classification.AdminTierLevelName)
| summarize Count = count() by RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName

| project RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName = iff(RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName == '', RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName1, RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName), Count = iff(RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName == '', 0, Count)
| sort by RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName asc","size":4,"title":"Classification of Privileged Access","timeContext":{"durationMs":604800000},"exportFieldName":"RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName","exportParameterName":"RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName","exportDefaultValue":"*","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{SelectLogAnalytics}"],"visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Count","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"},"numberFormat":{"unit":17,"options":{"maximumSignificantDigits":3,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},"secondaryContent":{"columnMatch":"Trend","formatter":9,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},"showBorder":false},"graphSettings":{"type":0,"topContent":{"columnMatch":"ObjectAdminTierLevelName","formatter":1},"centerContent":{"columnMatch":"Count","formatter":1,"numberFormat":{"unit":17,"options":{"maximumSignificantDigits":3,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}}},"customWidth":"50","name":"Role Classification","styleSettings":{"maxWidth":"50","showBorder":true}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"PrivilegedEAM
| where ObjectDisplayName contains '{PrincipalDisplayName}' or '{PrincipalDisplayName}' == ""
| where ObjectSubType contains "agent"
| where ObjectSubType contains '{ObjectSubType}' or '{ObjectSubType}' == "*"
| where ObjectAdminTierLevelName contains '{ObjectAdminTierLevelName}' or '{ObjectAdminTierLevelName}' == "*"
| where RoleSystem in ({RoleSystem}) or '*' in ({RoleSystem})
| extend Roles = parse_json(RoleAssignments)
| where Roles contains '{RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName}' or '{RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName}' == "*"
| extend Classification = parse_json(Classification)
| mv-expand Classification
| where Classification.AdminTierLevelName in ({AdminTierLevelName}) or '*' in ({AdminTierLevelName})
| where ObjectSubType contains '{ObjectSubType}' or '{ObjectSubType}' == "*"
| where ObjectDisplayName contains '{PrincipalDisplayName}' or '{PrincipalDisplayName}' == ""
| project-away TimeGenerated, Type
| extend AgentType = replace_string(ObjectSubType, "AgentIdentity", "")
| extend IdentityParent = tostring(IdentityParent)
| extend PortalDeepLink = case(
        (ObjectSubType == "AgentIdentity"), strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_RegisteredApps/AgentIdentity.MenuView/~/overview/objectId/", ObjectId),
        (ObjectSubType == "AgentUser"), strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_UsersAndTenants/UserProfileMenuBlade/~/overview/userId/", ObjectId),
        (ObjectSubType == "AgentIdentityBlueprintPrincipal"), strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_RegisteredApps/AllAgents.MenuView/~/allAgentIds/agentIdentityBlueprintId/", ObjectUserPrincipalName),
        ""
    )
| distinct
    DisplayName = tostring(ObjectDisplayName),
    ObjectId = tostring(ObjectId),
    ObjectUserPrincipalName = tostring(ObjectUserPrincipalName),    
    ObjectSubType,
    BlueprintId = tostring(ObjectUserPrincipalName),
    IdentityParent,
    ObjectAdminTierLevelName,
    Owners,
    Sponsors,
    PortalDeepLink
| extend OwnerList = parse_json(Owners)
| mv-expand OwnerId = iff(array_length(OwnerList) == 0, dynamic(['']), OwnerList) to typeof(string)
| lookup kind=leftouter (
    IdentityInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
    | project AccountObjectId, OwnerName = AccountDisplayName
) on $left.OwnerId == $right.AccountObjectId
| extend OwnerCount = array_length(OwnerList)
| summarize 
    OwnerDetails = make_list_if(bag_pack("Name", OwnerName, "Id", OwnerId), isnotempty(OwnerId)),
    OwnerNames = make_list_if(OwnerName, isnotempty(OwnerName)), // Create list of non-empty names        
    DisplayName = any(DisplayName),
    ObjectUserPrincipalName = any(ObjectUserPrincipalName),
    ObjectSubType = any(ObjectSubType),
    BlueprintId = any(BlueprintId),
    IdentityParent = any(IdentityParent),
    ObjectAdminTierLevelName = any(ObjectAdminTierLevelName),
    Sponsors = any(Sponsors),
    PortalDeepLink = any(PortalDeepLink),
    OwnerCount = any(OwnerCount)
    by ObjectId
| extend SponsorList = parse_json(Sponsors)
| mv-expand SponsorId = iff(array_length(SponsorList) == 0, dynamic(['']), SponsorList) to typeof(string)
| lookup kind=leftouter (
    IdentityInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
    | project AccountObjectId, SponsorName = AccountDisplayName
) on $left.SponsorId == $right.AccountObjectId
| extend SponsorCount = array_length(SponsorList)
| summarize 
    SponsorDetails = make_list_if(bag_pack("Name", SponsorName, "Id", SponsorId), isnotempty(SponsorId)),
    SponsorNames = make_list_if(SponsorName, isnotempty(SponsorName)), // Create list of non-empty names
    OwnerDetails = any(OwnerDetails),
    OwnerNames = any(OwnerNames),    
    DisplayName = any(DisplayName),
    ObjectUserPrincipalName = any(ObjectUserPrincipalName),
    ObjectSubType = any(ObjectSubType),
    BlueprintId = any(BlueprintId),
    IdentityParent = any(IdentityParent),
    ObjectAdminTierLevelName = any(ObjectAdminTierLevelName),
    PortalDeepLink = any(PortalDeepLink),
    SponsorCount = any(SponsorCount),
    OwnerCount = any(OwnerCount)
    by ObjectId
| extend Sponsors = strcat_array(SponsorNames, ", ") // Convert list to comma-separated string
| extend Owners = strcat_array(OwnerNames, ", ") // Convert list to comma-separated string
| where Sponsors contains '{SponsorFilter}' or '{SponsorFilter}' == ""","size":0,"title":"Agent ID },{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"Subtract","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"Owners","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"linkColumn":"OwnerDetails","linkTarget":"CellDetails","linkIsContextBlade":true,"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"!=","thresholdValue":"","representation":"Person","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"contains","thresholdValue":",","representation":"PersonWithFriend","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"Subtract","text":""}]}},{"columnMatch":"AgentType","formatter":5},{"columnMatch":"ObjectDisplayName","formatter":5},{"columnMatch":"AssociatedWorkload","formatter":13,"formatOptions":{"linkTarget":null,"showIcon":true}}],"hierarchySettings":{"idColumn":"ObjectUserPrincipalName","parentColumn":"IdentityParent","treeType":0,"expanderColumn":"DisplayName","expandTopLevel":false},"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"$gen_thresholds_DisplayName_5","sortOrder":1}]},"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"$gen_thresholds_DisplayName_5","sortOrder":1}],"tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"Count","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"auto"},"numberFormat":{"unit":17,"options":{"maximumSignificantDigits":3,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}},"secondaryContent":{"columnMatch":"Trend","formatter":9,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},"showBorder":false},"graphSettings":{"type":0,"topContent":{"columnMatch":"ObjectAdminTierLevelName","formatter":1},"centerContent":{"columnMatch":"Count","formatter":1,"numberFormat":{"unit":17,"options":{"maximumSignificantDigits":3,"maximumFractionDigits":2}}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"Agent ID Objects","styleSettings":{"maxWidth":"50","showBorder":true}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"PrivilegedEAM
| where ObjectId == '{ObjectId}' or '{ObjectId}' == '*'
| where ObjectSubType contains "agent"
| where RoleSystem in ({RoleSystem}) or '*' in ({RoleSystem})
| extend Roles = parse_json(RoleAssignments)
| extend Classification = parse_json(Classification)
| where ObjectDisplayName contains '{PrincipalDisplayName}' or '{PrincipalDisplayName}' == ""
| where Classification contains ({AdminTierLevelName}) or '*' in ({AdminTierLevelName})
| where ObjectAdminTierLevelName == '{ObjectAdminTierLevelName}' or '*' == '{ObjectAdminTierLevelName}'
| where parse_json(Classification) contains '{RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName}' or '*' == '{RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName}'
| mv-expand RoleAssignments
| project RoleAssignments, RoleSystem, ObjectDisplayName, ObjectSubType
| evaluate bag_unpack(RoleAssignments)
| extend Classification = column_ifexists("Classification","")
| mv-expand parse_json(Classification)
| extend AdminTierLevel = Classification.AdminTierLevelName
| where AdminTierLevel == '{RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName}' or '{RoleClassificationAdminTierLevelName}' == "*"
| extend Service = Classification.Service
| where Service in ({Service}) or '*' in ({Service})
| extend TaggedBy = Classification.TaggedBy
| extend TransitiveBy = column_ifexists("TransitiveByObjectDisplayName", "")
| extend TransitiveByAssignment = column_ifexists("RoleAssignmentSubType", "")
| summarize AdminTierLevels = make_set(AdminTierLevel), Service = make_set(Service), TaggedBy = make_set(TaggedBy) by
    ObjectDisplayName,
    ObjectSubType,
    ObjectId,
    RoleSystem,
    tostring(RoleAssignmentId),
    RoleDefinitionName,
    tostring(RoleAssignmentScopeId),
    RoleAssignmentScopeName,
    PIMAssignmentType,
    RoleAssignmentType,
    TransitiveBy,
    TransitiveByAssignment,
    EligibilityBy
| extend AdminTierLevel = iff(isnotempty(AdminTierLevels[0]), AdminTierLevels[0], "Unclassified")
| sort by tostring(AdminTierLevel) asc, tostring(RoleAssignmentScopeId) asc, RoleDefinitionName asc
| project-reorder ObjectDisplayName, RoleSystem, Service, AdminTierLevel, RoleDefinitionName, RoleAssignmentScopeName, PIMAssignmentType, RoleAssignmentType, TransitiveBy, TransitiveByAssignment, EligibilityBy, Service, ObjectSubType
| project-away AdminTierLevels
| sort by ObjectDisplayName asc, RoleSystem, RoleDefinitionName asc","size":2,"title":"Assignment of
